chunks.text: Jason recaps an eventful week in Washington
Trump's tariffs: endgame, impact, chaos, master plan
DOGE, IRA grifting, do campaign contributions need to be capped?
Trump 2.0 favoring Main Street over Wall Street, bond market breakdown, re-balancing the economy
State of Ukraine/Russia, the Western alliance, and how techno-optimism plays into the future of defense pacts
GPT-4.5, Grok 3 on X, and the Golden Age of language models
David Sacks joins Jason to break down the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and Digital Asset Stockpile
Sacks addresses clearing all of his crypto-related positions prior to Inauguration Day
